zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Bereham於大約1347年出生在英國奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德時，她的父親Henry de Bereham IV63歲，母親Elizabeth Colepepper49歲。她於1368年與William de Verney在英國英格蘭奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1390年在她的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Bereham于大约1347年出生在英国奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德时，她的父亲Henry de Bereham IV63岁，母亲Elizabeth Colepepper49岁。她于1368年与William de Verney在英国英格兰奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1390年在她的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bereham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Boreham (Essex), Boreham Wood in Elstree (Hertfordshire), Boreham Street in Wartling (Sussex), or Boreham in Warminster (Wiltshire). The placenames in Essex, Sussex and Hertfordshire are probably named with Old English bor ‘hill’ + ham ‘homestead’. Compare Boram and Borom .

variants.name: Borom
meanings: English: variant of   Boreham  . Compare   Boram  .

variants.name: Boram
meanings: English (Essex and Kent): variant of   Boreham  . Compare   Borom   and   Borum  .

variants.name: Borum
meanings: Danish: habitational name from any of several places whose name means ‘dwelling place on the edge’.
English (North Yorkshire): variant of   Boreham  . Compare   Boram  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Bereham was born about 1347, in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Henry de Bereham IV, was 63 and her mother, Elizabeth Colepepper, was 49. She married William de Verney in 1368, in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1390, in her hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Bereham est née environ 1347, à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Bereham IV, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Colepepper, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé William de Verney en 1368, à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Bereham um 1347 in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Bereham IV 63 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Colepepper 49. Sie hat 1368 in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom William de Verney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1390 im Alter von 44 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Bereham è nata il circa 1347 nel Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Henry de Bereham IV, aveva 63 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Colepepper, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato William de Verney nel 1368, nel Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1390, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Berehamが約1347年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイプトン-ウンデル-ウイチウッドで生まれた時，父Henry de Bereham IVは63歳，母Elizabeth Colepepperは49歳であった。1368年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイプトン-ウンデル-ウイチウッドでWilliam de Verneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1390年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Bereham(이)가 대략 1347년 영국 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Bereham IV(은)는 63세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Colepepper(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에서 William de Verney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Bereham nasceu aproximadamente 1347, em Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Bereham IV, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Colepepper, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Verney em 1368, em Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1390, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Bereham родилась около 1347 г. в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Bereham IV было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Colepepper, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Verney в 1368 г. в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1390 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Bereham nació aproximadamente 1347, en Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Bereham IV, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Colepepper, tenía 49 años. Se casó con William de Verney en 1368, en Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1390, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
